title: Congressman Walter Jones: Address to Schiller Conference
description:
Over 300 political activists and diplomats, gathering in New York City on Jan. 26 for a conference of the Schiller Institute, unanimously endorsed a call by Rep. Walter Jones (R-NC) to mobilize support for two important legislative initiatives now before the 113th Congress. 1) House Concurrent Resolution 3, dealing with re-asserting the War Powers of Congress, 2) House Resolution 129, to re-instate Glass-Steagall.

1.) "H. Con. Resolution 3" a bill that prevents the president from unathorized war under grounds of impeachment.
2.) H.R. 129 to reinstate Glass-Steagall
